title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bharat Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
